title: RoboLineage DatasetLock
description: Immutable freeze-point for a dataset version. Once written, never modified. Mirrors robolineage_contracts.pipeline.DatasetLock. See docs/artifact_contracts.md.

included_rollout_ids.description: Sorted list of rollout_ids included in this version.

manifest_sha256.description: SHA256 hex of the canonicalised train_manifest.jsonl entries (sorted by rollout_id, then sort_keys=True, utf-8).

changelog.description: Human-readable summary of what's new in this version.
